# Chapter 9 Player ID Locales

The Player ID Locales feature maintains country and state codes beyond the default list provided within Machine Accounting. These codes are used during W2G tax form processing.

## 9.1 Adding Player ID Locales

To add a player ID locale, the following information is required:

- **Type** — Country or State
- **Name** — Full name of the country or state
- **Abbreviation** — Standard abbreviation for the country or state

## 9.2 Deleting Player ID Locales

Existing country or state codes can be removed from the system. Deletion requires confirmation.
